zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Andrew Gray of Broxmouth - Lord Grey of Foulis於1355年出生在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安布洛姆斯時，他的父親Sir Patrick Gray Laird of Broxmouth25歲，母親Joanne de Cobham21歲。他於1377年6月20日與Janet Mortimer of March在蘇格蘭培爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1441年7月28日在英國蘇格蘭洛包爾享年86歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾鄧巴。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Andrew Gray of Broxmouth - Lord Grey of Foulis于1355年出生在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安布洛姆斯时，他的父亲Sir Patrick Gray Laird of Broxmouth25岁，母亲Joanne de Cobham21岁。他于1377年6月20日与Janet Mortimer of March在苏格兰培爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1441年7月28日在英国苏格兰洛包爾享年86岁，埋葬在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾鄧巴。

nameMeanings.name: Gray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: McGreevy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Seamus, Brendan.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mag Riabhaigh, a patronymic from the personal name Riabhach ‘brindled, grizzled’. Compare Reavey and Creevy 2.

variants.name: Grayer
meanings: English (southern): nickname from Middle English grei ‘gray’ (see Gray ) + her ‘hair’.

variants.name: Grays
meanings: English (Durham): variant of Gray , with post-medieval excrescent -s, or of Grace .

variants.name: Grice
meanings: English (Midlands): from Middle English grice, grise ‘pig’ (Old Norse gríss), probably a nickname or a metonymic occupational name for a swineherd.
English: nickname for a gray-haired man, from Middle English grice, gris ‘gray’ (Old French gris, apparently of ancient Germanic origin, and probably a distant cognate of Gray 1).
Possibly also an Americanized form of German   Greis  .

variants.name: Grey
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

nameMeanings.name: Andrew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Greek name Andreas, a short form of any of various compound names derived from andr- ‘man, warrior’. In the New Testament this is the name of the first disciple to be called by Jesus. After the Resurrection, St Andrew preached in Asia Minor and Greece. He is traditionally believed to have been crucified at Patras in Achaia. He was one of the most popular saints of the Middle Ages and was adopted as the patron of Scotland, Russia, and Greece. It has long been among the most popular boys' names in the English-speaking world, especially in Scotland. Its popularity in England was further enhanced by its use as a British royal name for Prince Andrew ( b. 1960 ), the Duke of York.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Andrew Gray of Broxmouth - Lord Grey of Foulis was born in 1355, in Broxmouth, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Patrick Gray Laird of Broxmouth, was 25 and his mother, Joanne de Cobham, was 21. He married Janet Mortimer of March on 20 June 1377, in Perthshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 28 July 1441, in Roxburghshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 86, and was buried in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Andrew Gray of Broxmouth - Lord Grey of Foulis est né en 1355, à Broxmouth, East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Patrick Gray Laird of Broxmouth, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Joanne de Cobham, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Janet Mortimer of March le 20 juin 1377, à Perthshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 28 juillet 1441, à Roxburghshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterré à Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Andrew Gray of Broxmouth - Lord Grey of Foulis 1355 in Broxmouth, East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Patrick Gray Laird of Broxmouth 25 und seine Mutter Joanne de Cobham 21. Er hat am 20. Juni 1377 in Perthshire, Scotland Janet Mortimer of March geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 28. Juli 1441 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Roxburghshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Andrew Gray of Broxmouth - Lord Grey of Foulis è nato il nel 1355 nel Broxmouth, East Lothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Patrick Gray Laird of Broxmouth, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Joanne de Cobham, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Janet Mortimer of March il 20 giugno 1377, nel Perthshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 28 luglio 1441, nel Roxburghshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 86 anni, e fu sepolto a Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Andrew Gray of Broxmouth - Lord Grey of Foulisが1355年にイギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンブロクスモウスで生まれた時，父Sir Patrick Gray Laird of Broxmouthは25歳，母Joanne de Cobhamは21歳であった。1377年6月20日にスコットランドペルスシュアイアでJanet Mortimer of Marchと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1441年7月28日にイギリススコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアで86歳で死去し，スコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアダンバーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Andrew Gray of Broxmouth - Lord Grey of Foulis(이)가 1355년 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 브록스모우스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Patrick Gray Laird of Broxmouth(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Joanne de Cobham(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1377년 6월 20일 스컷랜드 퍼스실르에서 Janet Mortimer of March(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1441년 7월 28일 영국 스코틀랜드 록스버그h실르에서 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 던바에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Andrew Gray of Broxmouth - Lord Grey of Foulis nasceu em 1355, em Broxmouth, East Lothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Patrick Gray Laird of Broxmouth, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Joanne de Cobham, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Janet Mortimer of March em 20 de junho de 1377, em Perthshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 28 de julho de 1441, em Roxburghshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 86 anos, e foi sepultado em Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Andrew Gray of Broxmouth - Lord Grey of Foulis родился в 1355 г. в местности броксмоут, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Patrick Gray Laird of Broxmouth было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Joanne de Cobham, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Janet Mortimer of March 20 июня 1377 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 28 июля 1441 г. в местности роксбургшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 86 лет и был похоронен в местности дунбар, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия.

Se casó con Janet Mortimer of March el 20 de junio de 1377, en Perthshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 28 de julio de 1441, en Roxburghshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 86 años, y fue sepultado en Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.
